app.soonTooltip: Show only chores due soon or overdue

backup.title: Backup & Restore
backup.replaceWarning: This will replace all current data with the backup.
backup.replaceRemoteWarning: This will replace all current data with the remote backup.
backup.areYouSureBody: This replaces all your current data with the backup. If cloud sync is on, the change applies to every synced device.
backup.snapshotNote: A backup of your current data is saved first, so you can undo this.
backup.emptyBackup: That backup is empty — nothing was changed.
backup.importDesc: Restore from a local JSON file
backup.clearSampleDesc: Remove the example categories and chores
backup.invalidFile: Not a valid lastGLANCE backup file.
backup.importFailed: Import failed — the file may be corrupted.

categorySection.noChores: No chores yet — tap Edit to add one.
categorySection.deleteCategoryWithSubsConfirm: Delete "{{name}}" and all its chores and subcategories?
categorySection.alsoRemovesHistory: This also removes all completion history.

choreForm.cadenceHint: Leave blank for no target — just tracking.
choreForm.autoSendHint: Emits a create intent once per day when this chore is overdue
choreForm.seasonalHint: Only shown in the main view within this date range each year.
choreForm.cadenceInvalid: Cadence must be a whole number of days

help.title: Help & Feedback
help.persistentStorageWarning: Your browser may clear app data under storage pressure. Allow persistent storage to protect your data.

integration.title: dayGLANCE Integration
integration.automationDescription: Let Tasker and other automation apps create, complete, open, and query chores by sending Android intents.
integration.enableAutomationHint: Off by default. When on, any app installed on this device can create, complete, and read your chores, and receive chore data (names and times) via broadcasts.
integration.enableIntegrationHint: Controls the WebDAV intents transport only — GLANCEvault intents are set below.
integration.passwordHint: Stored in browser localStorage — keep your device secure.
integration.encryptionActiveHint: Encryption active. Set up once; remains active across sessions.
integration.encryptionSyncHint: Uses your cloud sync passphrase. Set up once; remains active across sessions.
integration.encryptionRequiresSync: Requires cloud sync encryption to be enabled first
integration.syncPassphraseHint: Used once to set up encryption. Not stored after save.
integration.passphraseRequired: Enter your sync passphrase to complete setup
integration.vaultIntentsEncryptionRequired: GLANCEvault intents requires encryption setup — enter your sync passphrase to enable it.
integration.vaultIntentsSaltMissing: GLANCEvault has no encryption salt registered yet. Sync at least once first, then try again.
integration.vaultIntentsNoConnection: No GLANCEvault connection found. Set up the GLANCEvault server in Sync settings first.

passphrase.title: Unlock Sync
passphrase.description: Enter your encryption passphrase to resume syncing.
passphrase.insecureContext: Sync encryption requires a secure connection — HTTPS, or http://localhost. This page is on an insecure address, so encryption isn't available here.

ribbon.nothingAssignedToYou: Nothing here is assigned to you.

sync.title: Cloud Sync

errors.APP_ID_MISMATCH: This sync folder belongs to a different app. Pick a folder created by lastGLANCE.
errors.SCHEMA_FORWARD_INCOMPATIBLE: This data was saved by a newer version of lastGLANCE. Update the app to sync.
errors.PASSPHRASE_REQUIRED: Enter your sync passphrase to continue.
errors.PRECONDITION_FAILED: Sync hit a conflict and needs to retry. Please sync again.
errors.FORBIDDEN: The sync server refused access. Check your account's permissions.
errors.AUTH_FAILURE: Sign-in failed. Check your username and password.
errors.LOCKED: Another device is syncing right now. Try again in a moment.
errors.NETWORK_ERROR: Couldn't reach the sync server. Check your connection and try again.
errors.KEY_MISMATCH: Wrong sync passphrase — it must exactly match the passphrase used on your other devices.
errors.ROW_DECRYPT_FAILED: Some synced data couldn't be decrypted. Check your sync passphrase.
errors.VERIFIER_UNSUPPORTED: Your sync server needs to be updated to support key verification.
errors.ACCOUNT_ID_REQUIRED: Finishing sync setup — try again in a moment.
errors.passphraseNeeded: Enter your sync passphrase to continue.
errors.requestFailed: Sync request failed. Please try again.

sync.haltedDescription: A critical error occurred. Resolve the issue and clear to retry.
sync.autoSaveHint: Settings are saved automatically when you close this dialog.
sync.syncInactive: Sync is off — data stays on this device
sync.folderHint: Path on your WebDAV server where sync files are stored.
sync.passwordHint: Stored in browser localStorage — keep your device secure.
sync.passphraseNotice: This passphrase cannot be recovered. You will need it to set up sync on new devices. Store it in a password manager.
sync.autoBackupHint: Enable on one device only to avoid duplicate backups.

users.title: Users
users.multiUserHint: Tag chores with specific household members
users.nameTaken: A user with that name already exists
users.setMeAriaLabel: Set as me on this device
users.sharedUsersPathHint: Path on WebDAV where glance-users.json is stored. Must match across all GLANCE apps.
users.syncNotConfigured: Cloud sync is not configured. Set up WebDAV under Settings → Cloud Sync first.

welcome.title: Welcome to lastGLANCE
welcome.description: lastGLANCE helps you track when you last did something, and optionally surface when you need to do it again.
welcome.cadenceText: Set a target interval in days — overdue chores sort to the top automatically.
welcome.remindersText: Opt in to browser notifications when a chore is overdue.
welcome.seasonalText: Hide chores outside their active date range each year.
welcome.syncText: Keep everything in sync across devices via WebDAV or Nextcloud.

paywall.pitch: Track when you last did everything that matters. One unlock, every feature.
paywall.trialSubtitle_one: Free for {{count}} day, nothing charged today. Cancel anytime, keep your data.
paywall.trialSubtitle_other: Free for {{count}} days, nothing charged today. Cancel anytime, keep your data.
paywall.trialSubtitleGeneric: Nothing charged today. Cancel anytime, keep your data.
paywall.trialExplainer_one: Your {{count}}-day free trial automatically converts to a {{price}}/year subscription that renews annually until canceled. Cancel anytime in your {{store}} subscription settings.
paywall.trialExplainer_other: Your {{count}}-day free trial automatically converts to a {{price}}/year subscription that renews annually until canceled. Cancel anytime in your {{store}} subscription settings.
paywall.trialExplainerGeneric: Your free trial automatically converts to a {{price}}/year subscription that renews annually until canceled. Cancel anytime in your {{store}} subscription settings.
paywall.subExplainer: {{price}}/year, renews annually until canceled. Cancel anytime in your {{store}} subscription settings.
paywall.reviewerHint: For app-store reviewers only. Not a promo code.
